{"id":"to-cqu","title":"Add elo column to dishes table and build POST /api/vote endpoint","description":"The dishes table is missing an elo column. Add it (default 1200) to schema.ts and seed.sql. Then create src/routes/api/vote/+server.ts: POST takes {winnerId, loserId}, validates both dishes exist, records two vote rows (winner value=1, loser value=-1), calls processVote() from src/lib/elo.ts to compute new ratings, updates both dishes.elo in D1, returns {winnerId, loserID, winnerElo, loserElo}. Use Drizzle ORM (already wired via wrangler D1 binding). Integration branch: integration/tot-app.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"seth@designgods.net","created_at":"2026-03-27T01:25:26Z","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2026-03-27T01:25:26Z"}

attached_formula: mol-polecat-work

The dishes table is missing an elo column. Add it (default 1200) to schema.ts and seed.sql. Then create src/routes/api/vote/+server.ts: POST takes {winnerId, loserId}, validates both dishes exist, records two vote rows (winner value=1, loser value=-1), calls processVote() from src/lib/elo.ts to compute new ratings, updates both dishes.elo in D1, returns {winnerId, loserID, winnerElo, loserElo}. Use Drizzle ORM (already wired via wrangler D1 binding). Integration branch: integration/tot-app."}

{"id":"to-8nk","title":"Build home page: two random dishes head-to-head voting UI","description":"Replace the placeholder src/routes/+page.svelte with the actual voting UI. Load two random dishes from D1 in the +page.server.ts load function. Show them side-by-side using DishCard from src/lib/components/DishCard.svelte. When user clicks a card, POST to /api/vote with {winnerId, loserId}, show loading state on both cards, then load a fresh pair. Add a subtle 'vs' divider between the cards. The dishes table will have an elo column (done by to-cqu). Integration branch: integration/tot-app.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"seth@designgods.net","created_at":"2026-03-27T01:25:33Z","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2026-03-27T01:25:33Z"}

{"id":"to-cqu","title":"Add elo column to dishes table and build POST /api/vote endpoint","description":"The dishes table is missing an elo column. Add it (default 1200) to schema.ts and seed.sql. Then create src/routes/api/vote/+server.ts: POST takes {winnerId, loserId}, validates both dishes exist, records two vote rows (winner value=1, loser value=-1), calls processVote() from src/lib/elo.ts to compute new ratings, updates both dishes.elo in D1, returns {winnerId, loserID, winnerElo, loserElo}. Use Drizzle ORM (already wired via wrangler D1 binding). Integration branch: integration/tot-app.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"seth@designgods.net","created_at":"2026-03-27T01:25:26Z","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2026-03-27T02:22:27Z"}

The dishes table is missing an elo column. Add it (default 1200) to schema.ts and seed.sql. Then create src/routes/api/vote/+server.ts: POST takes {winnerId, loserId}, validates both dishes exist, records two vote rows (winner value=1, loser value=-1), calls processVote() from src/lib/elo.ts to compute new ratings, updates both dishes.elo in D1, returns {winnerId, loserID, winnerElo, loserElo}. Use Drizzle ORM (already wired via wrangler D1 binding). Integration branch: integration/tot-app."}

{"id":"to-6sn","title":"E2E tests failing: async_hooks compatibility issue","description":"## Issue

E2E tests are failing due to a Cloudflare Workers compatibility issue with async_hooks.

### Error

could not resolve async_hooks
.svelte-kit/output/server/entries/hooks.server.js:4:47:
  const { AsyncLocalStorage } = await import(async_hooks);

The package async_hooks wasn't found on the file system but is built into node.
- Add the nodejs_compat compatibility flag to your project.

### Impact

E2E tests cannot run, blocking CI/CD pipeline.

### Affected Commands

- npm run test
- npm run test:e2e
- playwright test

### Reproduction

1. Checkout main branch
2. Run: npm run test:e2e
3. Observe build failure

### Notes

This is a pre-existing issue not caused by recent changes. Affects refinery merge processing.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"seth@designgods.net","created_at":"2026-03-29T05:17:50Z","created_by":"totornot/refinery","updated_at":"2026-03-29T05:17:50Z"}
